title: A Baby
content:
Why speak of Rajah rubies,
    And roses of the South?
    I know a sweeter crimson
    A baby's mouth.

    Why speak of Sultan sapphires
    And violet seas and skies?
    I know a lovelier azure
    A baby's eyes.

    Go seek the wide world over!
    Search every land and mart!
    You 'll never find a pearl like this
    A baby's heart.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "A Baby"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
